text: I find myself in a place filled with subtle anticipation—the kind bred in spaces built for innovation and collaboration. The meeting room beyond the glass is empty, glowing softly, as if awaiting ideas not yet formed. Moving further, bold colors and large typeface shout R+D on a wall—reminding me of the ceaseless dance between curiosity and creation. Surrounded by the promises of invention, I feel both excited and a little dwarfed by human ambition. Here, wonder tinges the air.
